code:
import io
import string

fn main() -> Unit
  let input = io.read_to_end()
  let n = string.len(input)
  mut nums = [0, 0, 0]
  mut idx = 0
  mut i = 0
  mut cur = 0
  mut sign = 1
  mut in_num = false
  while i < n
    let b = match string.byte_at(input, i)
    when Some(v)
      v
    when None
      0
    end
    let is_digit = b >= 48 and b <= 57
    let is_minus = b == 45
    let is_plus = b == 43
    if is_digit
      if not in_num
        in_num = true
        cur = 0
      end
      cur = cur * 10 + (b - 48)
    else if is_minus and not in_num
      in_num = true
      cur = 0
      sign = -1
    else if is_plus and not in_num
      in_num = true
      cur = 0
      sign = 1
    else
      if in_num
        if idx < 3
          mut tmp = [0, 0, 0]
          mut k = 0
          while k < 3
            if k == idx
              tmp = list.push(list_take(tmp, k), cur * sign)
            else
              let v = match list.get(nums, k)
              when Some(x)
                x
              when None
                0
              end
              tmp = list.push(list_take(tmp, k), v)
            end
            k = k + 1
          end
          nums = tmp
        end
        idx = idx + 1
        in_num = false
        sign = 1
      end
    end
    i = i + 1
  end
  if in_num
    if idx < 3
      mut tmp2 = [0, 0, 0]
      mut k2 = 0
      while k2 < 3
        if k2 == idx
          tmp2 = list.push(list_take(tmp2, k2), cur * sign)
        else
          let v2 = match list.get(nums, k2)
          when Some(x)
            x
          when None
            0
          end
          tmp2 = list.push(list_take(tmp2, k2), v2)
        end
        k2 = k2 + 1
      end
      nums = tmp2
    end
    idx = idx + 1
  end
  let a = match list.get(nums, 0)
  when Some(x)
    x
  when None
    0
  end
  let b_end = match list.get(nums, 1)
  when Some(x)
    x
  when None
    0
  end
  let s = match list.get(nums, 2)
  when Some(x)
    x
  when None
    1
  end
  mut out = ""
  mut v = a
  mut first = true
  while v < b_end
    if first
      out = "#{v}"
      first = false
    else
      out = "#{out} #{v}"
    end
    v = v + s
  end
  print(out)
end

fn list_take(_ xs: List<Int>, _ n: Int) -> List<Int>
  mut result = []
  mut i = 0
  while i < n
    let v = match list.get(xs, i)
    when Some(x)
      x
    when None
      0
    end
    result = list.push(result, v)
    i = i + 1
  end
  result
end
